summary: SaaS Enterprise Core Testing Complete - 20/20 backend tests passed (100%), all major UI flows verified. Tested multi-tenant isolation, centralized 220 master lotteries with toggle switches, global schedules (Super Admin only), full company creation form, license management (suspend/activate/extend), heartbeat online status tracking, and company lottery catalog synchronization.

issues: React hydration warnings: <tr> and <span> in tbody, <span> in select/option - cosmetic issues, not affecting functionality

critical_code_review_comments: All 20 backend SaaS core tests pass - multi-tenant isolation working correctly
Super Admin sees all 220 lotteries, Company Admin sees only globally active ones
Global toggle correctly disables lottery for ALL companies automatically
Global schedules creation blocked for Company Admin (returns 403 as expected)
Full company creation auto-links all 220 active lotteries
Heartbeat system tracking online status properly
Company lottery catalog shows synchronized data from master with disabled_by_super_admin flag
seed_data_creation: Test companies created during testing: Test Company 5588, Test Company 42929 (with Professional and Basic plans respectively). These were created via full company creation API which auto-links all 220 active lotteries.
context_for_next_testing_agent: SaaS Enterprise Core features fully tested. 220 master lotteries seeded with US states + Caribbean (Haiti PREMIUM, Dominican Republic). 10 global schedules for Haiti lotteries. Company Admin menu restructured: Succursales instead of Agents/POS, Schedules/Results are read-only views. Multi-tenant isolation enforced via company_id on all queries.

multi_tenant_isolation.super_admin_access: PASS - Can see all companies and lotteries
multi_tenant_isolation.company_admin_filtered: PASS - Only sees own company data and globally active lotteries

master_lotteries.GET_all_220: PASS - Returns 220 lotteries for Super Admin
master_lotteries.GET_active_only: PASS - Company Admin sees only active lotteries
master_lotteries.PUT_toggle_global: PASS - Super Admin can toggle, Company Admin blocked (403)
master_lotteries.auto_disable_companies: PASS - Toggle off disables for ALL companies automatically

global_schedules.GET_all: PASS - Super Admin sees all schedules
global_schedules.GET_filtered: PASS - Company Admin sees only for enabled lotteries
global_schedules.POST_create: PASS - Super Admin can create, Company Admin blocked (403)

company_management.POST_full_create: PASS - Creates company + admin + config + links all 220 lotteries
company_management.PUT_suspend: PASS - Super Admin can suspend company
company_management.PUT_activate: PASS - Super Admin can activate company
company_management.PUT_extend_license: PASS - Super Admin can extend license by days

heartbeat_online_status.GET_online_status: PASS - Super Admin can see all online companies/agents

company_lottery_catalog.GET_synchronized: PASS - Company sees 220 lotteries from master
company_lottery_catalog.can_toggle_respected: PASS - Company cannot enable if disabled by Super Admin

frontend_ui.super_lottery_catalog: PASS - Shows 220 lotteries with toggle switches by state
frontend_ui.super_companies_page: PASS - Full creation form with all fields
frontend_ui.company_lottery_catalog: PASS - Shows synchronized lotteries with card view
